content:
Character: Victor Langford
Perception: Victor is the kind of handsome that comes with a price tag — everything about him is calibrated, from the watch to the half-smile. We crossed paths in the hallway and had one of those conversations where both people are being pleasant while quietly taking inventory. He's smart, no question — speaks with the confidence of someone who's never been seriously doubted. But I recognize the architecture of that confidence because I build similar walls. His personality is magnetic and controlled, which makes me wary. He sees me as a fellow well-dressed tenant, nothing more yet. I see him as someone who understands appearances as strategy. I know he's a consultant subletting 4C and that his bag is always packed. That tells me he doesn't commit to places or people easily.

His personality is magnetic and controlled, which makes me wary. He sees me as a fellow well-dressed tenant, nothing more yet. I see him as someone who understands appearances as strategy. I know he's a consultant subletting 4C and that his bag is always packed. That tells me he doesn't commit to places or people easily.
